reviews.body: 初期不良と思われる事象があり、同封のアフターサービスへの連絡先にご連絡しました。対応していただけた方は日本人のスタッフ様で、質問への回答が非常に早く、こちらの状況をすぐに理解してくれました。また、こちらの提示した不具合状況から的確に初期不良の判断を下し、新品発送までの流れもスムーズで、最後まで安心してお任せできました。誠実な対応をありがとうございました

reviews.title: パッケージ内容に注意！
reviews.body: 開封した形跡があったり、モニターフィルムが剥がれかけていた上に、取扱説明書が同梱されていませんでした。取説だけ欲しいところですがシステム上できないのと、両親の希望品で急ぎで必要だったため返品・再注文している時間がありませんでした。商品に関しては、早送りにした後音が出なくなったり、バッテリーの残量をどこで見るのか分からなかったり、これがそもそもの仕様なのかそうでないのかも取説がないので分かりません。高齢者に扱えるのか不安です。
reviews.date: 2026年4月10日に日本でレビュー済み

reviews.title: 当たり外れがあるかも
reviews.body: 本年の１月末に購入。購入当初から、DVDを挿入しても「ディスクが認識されません」というメッセージが出てしまいます。複数のメディアで試しましたが、ダメでした。返品も面倒なので、何回に１回かは読んでくれるので、半ば諦めていましたが、先ほどまで再生していたのに同じメッセージが出るようになりましたので、諦めました。ところが、返品期間が過ぎているということで、配送担当のアマゾンからは無理。２年保証とのことなので、直接販売者とのやり取りになりました。C国だったので、嫌な予感はしましたが、これが史上最悪の使いにくさ・・・今やり取り中ですが、当店で購入しいたものではない等のあり得ない発言。絶対に購入すべきではありません！！！【追記】その後、連絡がつき、代替品を新品で直ぐに送ってくれました。その姿勢に対し、誠意を感じました。ですので評価を変更します。
reviews.date: 2026年3月30日に日本でレビュー済み

reviews.title: おすすめです

reviews.title: Sound unbearable, so tinny and the picture grainy. Returned. Seller sent another free, faulty
reviews.body: Update: 18th August 2025. Company reached out to us and offered us a free replacement DVD player at their expense. This arrived quickly. Noticed straight away there was a large kink the the ribbon which attaches to the disc player. This transmits the data and reads the disc, which means there was no chance of the discs being able to be read as we have found out tonight when showing the photo of the kink and explaining none of the discs we tried worked, so it made perfect sense to us then. He also said he couldn’t see how the company could possibly have missed it, as it’s such an integral part of the machines working. DVD player was disposed of at our local tip. Seller was informed. Sadly we cannot recommend this item as although seller did reached out and offered to send us one free, as they said to restore our faith in their company, receiving another on which didn’t even play discs due to it’s very obvious fault, we cannot recommend this DVD player and as others had said previously in reviews, this isn’t a one off, show a lack of quality control and also lack of quality in the items themselves. Such a shame. 1 star is all we can offer and if there was a chance at 0, it would really have to be, due to our personal experience of the item, having had two of them in the end.Based on the good reviews I read about the item, decided to give this a try, especially due to the audio and visual quality being well reviewed. Sadly the machine we received was the absolute opposite. First thing we noticed was the build quality, which was bulky plastic, top heavy, so the machine fell backwards, with the slightest touch to it, so counter balancing required for the bottom half, to eradicate this problem. that wasn't the deal breaker for us, but the following were. The visual quality of the player is grainy and I tried several different DVDs and tried the very basic function settings too, but it was so bad, had to put my reading glasses on just to get past the graining, which isn't at all acceptable. Then the worst part for us. The sound is dreadful, really tin like and echo like. Again trying the very limited basic functions to change and they are very limited, couldn't get any kind of acceptable sound from it and gave up. The design is bulky too and not small for transporting, but we could have over looked it's look from back in our day the 80s if the sound and picture had been acceptable, but for us personally couldn't cope with even 1 episode of one of my favourite box sets, so we have returned it. Good points as I try to find some, it's easy to operate, but due to its issues with the one we received, we couldn't recommend this product.
reviews.date: 2025年8月3日に英国でレビュー済み

reviews.title: Piece of junk
reviews.body: Do not buy this piece of junk. It started giving me problems within months of receiving it. At times it would just completely stop playing while the movie is going on. At other times it would not play the dvd only until you switch on and off the player. Yet at other times it would not play the dvd at all. And play all of a sudden again. Seems it works according to its mood. Returning the item is a big hassle if you live outside of UK and especially if you are not tech savy and elderly like myself. I wish I could just smash this piece of junk against the wall to vent my frustration with the entire experience.
reviews.date: 2024年9月22日に英国でレビュー済み

reviews.title: Faulty Remote/Player Good.
reviews.body: Great portable player charging the battery for the first time impressively only took 1 hour. Picture quality is amazing, disc is loud spinning on pause but silent during play.Remote control is the only let down as it doesn't work and I tried many new batteries, (hopefully this will be replaced I have contacted the company directly)All in all pleased with the purchase.UPDATECompany has now lost two starts in this review as they have ignored my request for a replacement remote instead asking for five star reviews and informing me that the free gifts are 1 only despite it not being clear on the paper work enclosed with the item, also reducing the size of the free bag to 15.6 inches from 17.5 far too small for this player. Further to this they requested my full contact details which they should already have since I gave them the order number.Think they are data mining ( SAME Chinese company is the brand and seller under different names ). On initially applying for the free gifts they claimed the screen shot was not clear enough and reviews not good enough. they must have 5 star reviews all round and if I copy the link to my review to it send them ( the other option to a screen shot) I see it automatically opens in to my amazon account.My five stars will not be bought if you are the seller do not contact me again.
reviews.date: 2021年3月13日に英国でレビュー済み

reviews.title: Somewhat Disapointed
reviews.body: You appear to get quite a lot for your money.  The picture quality is good and the sound louder than I expected BUT ... the player struggles with home made discs.  We have about fifty single and dual layer discs containing home video transferred from VHS.  These discs play perfectly on the PC and our Blu-Ray player but with this player the disc will play for about 15 minutes, then start to stutter and finally freeze.  Shame really, as we would have loved to play our home recordings on this player.
reviews.date: 2025年9月25日に英国でレビュー済み

reviews.title: Reasonable I Suppose
reviews.body: Let’s start off being positive:(1) The picture quality is superb with this player. The colours are vibrant and the images are sharp.(2) It’s very lightweight so is easy to transport. You can even buy a specially designed bag for the player if you need to transport it a lot.(3) The screen is a nice size. Large but not too large that it takes up too much space.(4) I like the way the screen angle can be adjusted. It’s a really nice feature.Here are a few things that aren’t so good:(1) It just looks and feels a bit cheap and plasticity. I’d be more than happy to pay a bit extra for a player made of metal or higher grade plastic but they don’t seem to be available.(2) The buttons on the remote are tiny and why you need so many I neither know nor care. All I want is a remote with a play, pause, forward and reverse button. That’s all. And preferably large enough to see without a magnifying glass!(3) The remote doesn’t come with a battery which is very unusual these days. So you will need to buy an AA battery with the player if you want to use the remote.(4) The built in speaker on the player is very poor quality. The sound quality just about adequate to watch a TV show but for a music concert it’s appalling. I had to buy a small Bluetooth transmitter to use with my Bluetooth headphones to enjoy music.(5) The way the screen is attached to the player is a bit flimsy. Don’t whatever you do let young kids use this machine or they will break it in no time!Overall, it more or less exactly what I was expecting for the money. Most people stream videos these days so the market for DVD players is very limited. This is one of the better (or least worst) options.
reviews.date: 2021年3月28日に英国でレビュー済み

reviews.title: 4:3画面の設定  イヤホンの相性
reviews.body: 価格的にもサイズ的にもお手軽でよかったです。たまに今まで読み込んでいたDVDが読み込まれなくなる時がありますが、何度か試せば再生されます😅あと電源を差し込んだままの使用はダメと説明書に記載あり。4:3画面の作品だと画面が横に伸びてしまいますが。「設定」ボタン→映像設定→画面モード→4:3で変更できます。あと、イヤホンで鑑賞していますが、イヤホンの良い悪い関係なく、かなり相性が良い悪いあるように感じました。音悪っと思っても他のに変えたら良好みたいな感じで。
reviews.date: 2025年10月15日に日本でレビュー済み
